list: RSOs must be recognized and in good standing
Each RSO will received $3 per vote received for their organization during the voting period, a minimum of 20 votes is required to receive funds (for example: 100 votes = $300)
Bonus: The top 3 RSOs with the most votes will receive additional funding
RSOs will be listed alphabetically on the voting form
Voters do NOT need to be members of the RSO they are voting for
RSOs may self-promote and encourage Cal State LA students to vote for them during the Student Leader Election
RSOs may create their own marketing material or reshare Student Leader Election materials inviting students to vote for them
RSOs may not require, coerce, or intimidate members or non-members to vote for the RSO. Any instances of misconduct should be reported immediately to CSI
RSOs must have an active RSO Bank account administered through ASI or an approved exemption to receive the funds
Access to the RSO funds must follow the appropriate RSO Banking policies and procedures
